children.heading: Reasonable cause waiver
children.label: a Reasonable cause waiver
children.text: No penalty shall be imposed under this part with respect to any failure if it is shown that such failure is due to reasonable cause and not to willful neglect.

children.heading: Payment of penalty
children.label: b Payment of penalty
children.text: Any penalty imposed by this part shall be paid on notice and demand by the Secretary and in the same manner as tax.

children.heading: Special rule for failure to meet magnetic media requirements
children.label: c Special rule for failure to meet magnetic media requirements
children.text: No penalty shall be imposed under section 6721 solely by reason of any failure to comply with the requirements of the regulations prescribed under section 6011(e)(2), except to the extent that such a failure occurs with respect to more than the applicable number (determined under section 6011(e)(5) with respect to the calendar year to which such returns relate) of information returns or with respect to a return described in section 6011(e)(4).

children.heading: Required filing date
children.label: 4 Required filing date
children.text: The term “required filing date” means the date prescribed for filing an information return with the Secretary (determined with regard to any extension of time for filing).

children.heading: Special rule for certain partnership returns
children.label: e Special rule for certain partnership returns
children.text: If any partnership return under section 6031(a) is required under section 6011(e) to be filed on magnetic media or in other machine-readable form, for purposes of this part, each schedule required to be included with such return with respect to each partner shall be treated as a separate information return.

children.heading: Special rule for returns of educational institutions related to higher education tuition and related expenses
children.label: f Special rule for returns of educational institutions related to higher education tuition and related expenses
children.text: No penalty shall be imposed under section 6721 or 6722 solely by reason of failing to provide the TIN of an individual on a return or statement required by section 6050S(a)(1) if the eligible educational institution required to make such return contemporaneously makes a true and accurate certification under penalty of perjury (and in such form and manner as may be prescribed by the Secretary) that it has complied with standards promulgated by the Secretary for obtaining such individual’s TIN.

children.heading: Special rule for reporting certain additional taxes
children.label: g Special rule for reporting certain additional taxes

children.text: a person makes a return or report under section 6047(d) or 408(i) with respect to any distribution,
such distribution is made following a rollover, transfer, or exchange described in section 72(t)(4)(C) or section 72(q)(3)(C),

in making such return or report the person relies upon a certification provided by the taxpayer that the distributions satisfy the requirements of section 72(t)(4)(C)(iii) or section 72(q)(3)(B)(iii), as applicable, and
such person does not have actual knowledge that the distributions do not satisfy such requirements.
